response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the video for scene changes and song metadata. \n2. 00:00 - 03:26: Song identified as '[A]ddiction'. On-screen text confirmed title. Searched for '[A]ddiction Giga Japanese and English lyrics'. Found lyrics.\n3. 03:27 - 05:00: Song identified as 'Life Will Change'. On-screen text confirmed title. Searched for 'Life Will Change Persona 5 English lyrics'. Found lyrics. Original language is English.
response.global_summary: A two-song medley performance by Hololive virtual talents: Hakos Baelz singing "[A]ddiction" followed by Ouro Kronii singing "Life Will Change".

scenes.description: Hakos Baelz performs '[A]ddiction', with the song title displayed on-screen at the beginning.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Predilection さあさ口をつけて
Predilection そのまま飲み込んで
Dedication たった一口で '終わり'
Addiction たった一口で '終わり'
Infatuation あなたしかいない
Addiction もうあなたに夢中
(Lyrics continue...)
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Predilection, come on, put it in your mouth
Predilection, swallow it as it is
Dedication, just one bite and it's 'over'
Addiction, just one bite and it's 'over'
Infatuation, you're the only one I want
Addiction, I'm already hooked on you
(Lyrics continue...)

scenes.description: Ouro Kronii performs 'Life Will Change', with the song title and credits displayed on-screen at the beginning.
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
It's not a game
I'm not a robot, AI challenging you
I'm not a phantom
I'm in your face and
I'm here to see it through
(Lyrics continue...)
